properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How many times have I heard that line Hey preacher I still have plenty of time But what you gonna do if He comes tonight What you gonna do Will you rise to meet Him in the air Or you'll be trapped down in the Laodicean age What do you gonna do when the church is gone, What you gonna do.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What you gonna do if the church is gone No more saints and no more songs To lift you up when you're feeling down To help to turn your life around You better get in while there's still time There's still room in this Gentile Bride What you gonna do if the church is gone, What you gonna do.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: People all around me they still say I just don't believe you gotta live this way But what you gonna do if you've been wrong What you gonna do You better turn-around and take another look Make sure your name is in the Lambs Book What you gonna do if the church is gone What you gonna do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Today is the time to walk with the Lord Like Enoch did and He was not But many are still deeply sleeping, oh something is wrong, You better WAKE-UP this is a NEW DAY It's SHALOM, it is Bride AGE What a day we live in Bless the Lord, Oh my soul.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I gonna fly home when the rapture will go With all the saints and with a new song To live forever with my Savior and my Lord The Message came down to change my life To quicken the seed that was down inside I'm going home when the rapture will go, I'm going home.
